title: CreateVnicDetails
description: Contains properties for a VNIC. Used when launching an instance or creating a VNIC attachment.

subnetId.description: The OCID of the subnet to create the VNIC in

displayName.description: A user-friendly name for the VNIC. Does not have to be unique.

assignPublicIp.description: Whether the VNIC should be assigned a public IP address. Defaults to whether the subnet is public or private.

assignPrivateDnsRecord.description: Whether the VNIC should be assigned a DNS record. Defaults to true.

privateIp.description: A private IP address of your choice to assign to the VNIC. Must be an available IP address within the subnet CIDR.

hostnameLabel.description: The hostname for the VNIC primary private IP. Used for DNS.

nsgIds.description: A list of the OCIDs of the network security groups to add the VNIC to

skipSourceDestCheck.description: Whether the source/destination check is disabled on the VNIC. Defaults to false.
